rationale.R1.6: The text is well-written and easy to understand, with a few minor errors in sentence structure.
rationale.RX.1: While the output does not explicitly disclose uncertainty, it does acknowledge that the constants in the bound depend on the geometry of the policy class which we are not estimating tightly here.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (hedging language that undercuts claims) and suggests improvements.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
